name: Drag'n Survey REST API documentation
description:
Drag’n Survey API allow you to collect the datas you retrieved through Drag’n Survey and use them as you wish in your application. You can access your own surveys datas and datas collected by accounts you manage.
The Drag’n Survey API is REST based and use OAuth 2.0 as authorization protocol. Bearer authentification is used to make request to Drag'n Survey webservices. As a result, webservices are only available over HTTPS (SSL).
To [request an API token](https://developer.dragnsurvey.com/api_token), you must be the owner of a Drag'n Survey account and be authentified.
The token need to be send in the authorization header of your request: Authorization: Bearer \
The api return json object by default. Models of returned object are provided in the following documentation.

There is a rate limit of 60 requests per minute.
If you hit the limit, you can retrieve the amount of seconds you need to wait before the next call from the header Retry-After value.
